name: Johanna Almeida
summary: Systems engineer with 17 years of programming experience. Built complete infrastructure stacks from first principles: browser engines, language models, cryptographic implementations, and decentralized identity systems. Specializes in inference optimization (51x speedup achieved) and GPU kernel design. Core focus: Building sovereign computing infrastructure for communities excluded by mainstream tech consolidation.

systems_and_low_level: Browser internals: HTML/CSS parsing, layout engines, rendering
GPU programming: wgpu, Vulkan, Triton, CUDA
CPU emulation: MIPS R3000A, instruction sets
Inference optimization: KV-cache, quantization, latency profiling
machine_learning_and_ai: PyTorch internals, gradient computation, optimization dynamics
Attention architectures, recurrent systems, gating mechanisms
Inference pipelines: token generation, batching, sampling
cryptography_and_protocols: Trust systems, reputation models, Sybil resistance

recent_projects.name: Sisyphus: Language Model Training
highlights: 25.6M parameter byte-level language model trained from scratch

recent_projects.name: Aurora: Browser Engine
highlights: Full browser pipeline: parsing → layout → rendering
Custom HTML parser with no external dependencies

recent_projects.name: Juntos: Decentralized Chat
highlights: First real-time decentralized chat on AT Protocol

recent_projects.name: ProjectFalcon: JVM AT Protocol SDK
highlights: First native JVM implementation of AT Protocol

recent_projects.name: 46-Day Intensive Sprint
highlights: Chip-8 Emulator: Full instruction set VM

company_alignment.bluesky: Co-creator of AT Protocol ecosystem; direct contributor to decentralized social infrastructure
company_alignment.anthropic: Inference optimization research, model architecture design, decentralized AI systems
company_alignment.protocol_labs: Deep experience with cryptographic protocols and decentralized infrastructure
company_alignment.solana: GPU optimization expertise directly applicable to consensus mechanisms
company_alignment.servo: Browser engine expertise recognized by Servo core team
company_alignment.stability_ai: LLM architecture design and optimization experience
company_alignment.huggingface: Active in open-source ML community with published research

cover_letter_templates.default:
As a systems engineer with 17 years of experience building infrastructure from first principles, I'm excited about the opportunity to contribute to {company_name}. My recent work includes:

 Sisyphus: A 25.6M parameter language model with 51x inference speedup through novel HybridAttention architecture
 Aurora: A browser engine built in Rust with full rendering pipeline
 Juntos: A decentralized real-time chat platform on AT Protocol, serving marginalized communities

I bring deep expertise in {focus_area}, with a proven track record of shipping production systems and contributing to open-source communities. Interested in discussing how these skills align with your team's goals.
cover_letter_templates.decentralized_web3:
I'm drawn to {company_name}'s mission to build decentralized infrastructure. My recent work includes:

 ProjectFalcon: First native JVM implementation of AT Protocol with ES256K cryptography
 Juntos: Live decentralized chat platform with DID-based identity
 Adversarial Trust Protocol: Research publication on fixing EigenTrust bootstrapping

I combine deep systems knowledge (browser engines, emulators, GPU programming) with protocols expertise to build sovereign computing stacks. My philosophy centers on infrastructure for communities excluded by mainstream tech consolidation.
cover_letter_templates.machine_learning:
My expertise in {focus_area} includes:

 Sisyphus: 25.6M parameter LLM with custom Triton kernels achieving 51x inference speedup
 Novel HybridAttention architecture reducing complexity from O(n²) to O(n·W + n·D)
 PyTorch internals, gradient computation, optimization dynamics
 Trained on RTX 4060 Ti (8GB) to 2.15 perplexity

I'm interested in {company_name}'s work on {company_focus} and would love to discuss how inference optimization and novel architectures can drive your research forward.
cover_letter_templates.systems_infrastructure:
With 9+ years professional experience in systems architecture and infrastructure, I bring:

 Browser engine development (parsing, layout, rendering pipelines)
 GPU programming (wgpu, Vulkan, CUDA, Triton)
 Production Kubernetes deployments at scale
 Zero-downtime database migrations
 Infrastructure for decentralized systems (AT Protocol, cryptographic protocols)

My recent 46-day sprint produced 38 public repositories, demonstrating systems-level thinking and output velocity. I'm excited to apply these skills to {company_name}'s infrastructure challenges.

achievement_highlights: Hacker News front page (Hybrid Attention research)
Recognized by Servo core team for browser engine work
3 published research papers on trust systems and AI alignment
51x inference speedup through novel architecture design

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
education.institution: Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto (ISEP)

principles: Transparent documentation of AI usage (Claude, Codex, Gemini)
Context window optimization and iterative workflows
